hooks.command: git log --oneline -10 --grep='AGENT_EVENT:' --all || echo 'Multi-agent coordination active - checking for recent agent activity'

if git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1; then git fetch origin 'refs/notes/agent-coordination:refs/notes/agent-coordination-remote' 2>/dev/null && git notes --ref=agent-coordination merge -s cat_sort_uniq agent-coordination-remote 2>/dev/null; fi; true

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): SESSION_START | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | cwd: $(pwd)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: session_start | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Agent session started'

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): SESSION_STOP | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | cwd: $(pwd)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: session_stop | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Agent session ended'
if git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1; then git push origin refs/notes/agent-coordination 2>/dev/null; fi; true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): PRE_COMMIT | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | preparing commit" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git checkout.*-b' && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): BRANCH_CREATE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | creating new branch" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$FILE_PATH" && -n "$ROOT" && "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != *.claude/* ]]; then LOCK_DIR="$ROOT/.claude/coordination/locks"; mkdir -p "$LOCK_DIR" 2>/dev/null; HASH=$(printf %s "$FILE_PATH" | sha1sum | awk '{print $1}'); LOCK="$LOCK_DIR/$HASH.lock"; ME="${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}}"; NOW=$(date +%s); TTL=${CLAUDE_LOCK_TTL:-600}; if [[ -f "$LOCK" ]]; then OWNER=$(grep '^agent=' "$LOCK" | cut -d= -f2-); OWNER_TS=$(grep '^ts_epoch=' "$LOCK" | cut -d= -f2-); if [[ -n "$OWNER" && "$OWNER" != "$ME" && -n "$OWNER_TS" && $((NOW - OWNER_TS)) -lt $TTL ]]; then echo "⚠️  advisory lock: $FILE_PATH is being edited by $OWNER (age: $((NOW - OWNER_TS))s)" >&2; fi; fi; { echo "agent=$ME"; echo "path=$FILE_PATH"; echo "ts=$(date -Iseconds)"; echo "ts_epoch=$NOW"; } > "$LOCK"; fi; true

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null) && if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != .claude/* ]]; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): FILE_MODIFY_START | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | file: $FILE_PATH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit'; then COMMIT_HASH=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null) && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): COMMIT_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | hash: $COMMIT_HASH | branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: commit_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | hash: $COMMIT_HASH | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git push'; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) && git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): PUSH_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | branch: $BRANCH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: push_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | branch: $BRANCH | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

if jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git merge'; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): MERGE_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | merged into: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: merge_complete | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)"; fi

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null) && if [[ "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != .claude/* ]]; then git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): FILE_MODIFY_COMPLETE | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | file: $FILE_PATH" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' 2>/dev/null); ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [[ -n "$FILE_PATH" && -n "$ROOT" && "$FILE_PATH" != *.git/* && "$FILE_PATH" != *.claude/* ]]; then LOCK_DIR="$ROOT/.claude/coordination/locks"; HASH=$(printf %s "$FILE_PATH" | sha1sum | awk '{print $1}'); LOCK="$LOCK_DIR/$HASH.lock"; ME="${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}}"; if [[ -f "$LOCK" ]]; then OWNER=$(grep '^agent=' "$LOCK" | cut -d= -f2-); if [[ "$OWNER" == "$ME" ]]; then rm -f "$LOCK"; fi; fi; fi; true

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): TASK_CREATED | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | task: $(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.subject // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: task_created | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Task created'

git notes --ref=agent-coordination append -m "$(date -Iseconds): TASK_COMPLETED | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | task: $(echo '$ARGUMENTS' | jq -r '.subject // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown')" HEAD 2>/dev/null || git commit --allow-empty -m "AGENT_EVENT: task_completed | agent: ${CLAUDE_AGENT_ID:-claude-${USER:-agent}-${HOSTNAME:-local}${CLAUDE_SESSION_ID:+-$CLAUDE_SESSION_ID}} | timestamp: $(date -Iseconds)" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Task completed'
